title: ollama/ollama
summary: The official Ollama CLI and server for running large language models locally with minimal setup.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python library for Ollama, providing a simple client to chat with local models.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama, usable in Node or browsers.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration for Ollama, enabling local models in chains, agents, and RAG pipelines.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (now Open WebUI) that feels like ChatGPT but runs 100 % locally.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with async, streaming, and Kotlin coroutines support.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Community-maintained Ruby gem for interacting with the Ollama API.

title: ollama-cli-chat
summary: Interactive CLI chat wrapper that adds conversation history and markdown rendering on top of Ollama.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that brings local Ollama models into GitHub Copilot-style inline suggestions.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration allowing Ollama models to be used as generators or embedders in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official Docker images for Ollama with CUDA and CPU variants, plus docker-compose examples.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU and persistent storage options.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nix derivation for Ollama, enabling reproducible installs on NixOS or via nix-env.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama + Chroma + LangChain in a single Docker Compose setup.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Discord bot that lets users chat with any Ollama model via slash commands.

title: ollama-slack-bot
summary: Lightweight Slack bot that plugs Ollama into Slack threads with rate-limiting and admin controls.

title: ollama-elixir
summary: Elixir wrapper for Ollama API with GenServer-backed process management and streaming.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Community Rust crate providing strongly-typed async bindings to the Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET library for Ollama with async streaming and dependency-injection friendly clients.

title: ollama-datasets
summary: Curated collection of example datasets and fine-tunes compatible with Ollama’s Modelfile format.
